title: File & Vector Store Management
description: Developer uploads files to provider storage, manages vector stores, and retrieves or deletes stored resources.

actors.name: Developer
actors.note: The application/consumer code driving all operations via static facade methods

actors.name: FileProvider
actors.note: Interface: getFile(), putFile(), deleteFile(), fileGateway(), useFileGateway()

actors.name: StoreProvider
actors.note: Interface: getStore(), createStore(), addFileToStore(), removeFileFromStore(), deleteStore(), storeGateway(), useStoreGateway()

actors.name: FileGateway
actors.note: Interface: low-level transport — getFile(provider, fileId), putFile(provider, file), deleteFile(provider, fileId)

actors.name: StoreGateway
actors.note: Interface: low-level transport — getStore, createStore, addFile, removeFile, deleteStore (all accept StoreProvider)

use_cases.name: Upload File
use_cases.flow: Developer → Files::put() → Ai::fakeableFileProvider() → FileProvider::putFile(StorableFile) → FileGateway::putFile() → StoredFileResponse
use_cases.notes: String input auto-wrapped as Base64Document; UploadedFile converted via Base64Document::fromUpload()

use_cases.name: Retrieve File
use_cases.flow: Developer → Files::get() → Ai::fakeableFileProvider() → FileProvider::getFile(fileId) → FileGateway::getFile() → FileResponse

use_cases.name: Delete File
use_cases.flow: Developer → Files::delete() → Ai::fakeableFileProvider() → FileProvider::deleteFile(fileId) → FileGateway::deleteFile() → void

use_cases.name: Create Vector Store
use_cases.flow: Developer → Stores::create() → Ai::fakeableStoreProvider() → StoreProvider::createStore(name, description, Collection, DateInterval) → StoreGateway::createStore() → Store

use_cases.name: Retrieve Vector Store
use_cases.flow: Developer → Stores::get() → Ai::fakeableStoreProvider() → StoreProvider::getStore(storeId) → StoreGateway::getStore() → Store

use_cases.name: Delete Vector Store
use_cases.flow: Developer → Stores::delete() or Store::delete() → StoreProvider::deleteStore(storeId) → StoreGateway::deleteStore() → bool

use_cases.name: Add File to Store
use_cases.flow: Developer → Store::add() → [if StorableFile: Store::storeFile() → Files::put() → StoredFileResponse] → StoreProvider::addFileToStore(storeId, HasProviderId, metadata) → StoreGateway::addFile() → AddedDocumentResponse
use_cases.notes: Optionally auto-uploads raw file before attaching. UploadedFile converted via Base64Document::fromUpload()

use_cases.name: Remove File from Store
use_cases.flow: Developer → Store::remove() → StoreProvider::removeFileFromStore(storeId, documentId) → bool; [if deleteFile=true && removed: Files::delete(fileId)] → bool

key_relationships: Store class composes FileProvider AND StoreProvider (intersection type: FileProvider&StoreProvider)
Store::add() internally calls Files::put() for raw StorableFile inputs (UC7 includes UC1)
Store::remove(deleteFile=true) internally calls Files::delete() (UC8 optionally includes UC3)
response_types: StoredFileResponse implements HasProviderId — returned by put file; exposes id()
AddedDocumentResponse implements HasProviderId — returned by add file to store
StoreFileCounts — embedded in Store; tracks file counts

testing_support.stores_fake: Stores::fake(responses, files=true) → FakeStoreGateway; also fakes Files if files=true
